title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises!
